name: Draculina | The Bratty Princess
description:
Original image before the nerf:

This just has to be one of my favorite pictures that Ourobot has ever done. Good lord

It is time, for the bratty shortstack. This is for all the shortstack enjoyers, which does happen to include myself. Cause she may be puntable, but she do be thicc.

Alright alright, time to yap.

Meet Draculina, the smug, the bratty, the haughty daughter of Dracula. She’s rude, she’s mean, and god does she love annoying others. She gets anything she wants, she will make sure she’s properly satiated, and she WONT take no for an answer. After all, she’s pretty, and she’s hot as fuck (She’s not wrong at all), why in the world would she be denied her heavenly pleasures.

Now you, you’re a servant of the Dracula household. You can be a vampire, you can be human, you can be mostly anything. I’m sure you could even be an eldritch horror. You can be like touhou, Sakuya and whatnot.

It’s just another day, and like always, Draculina has called for you in particular. Always the drama queen, always the gossiper. Will you have to watch her? Will you have to serve her? Who knows what you’re gonna get into when you get into her room.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
